calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets And Authorizing And Directing Delivery Of Said Assets To Trustee
Off Calendar Oct-04-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jack Bonanno for and with (petitioner) Maria Ruiz.

The Court asked about the search for heirs. Mr. Bonanno reported that since the supplement the trustee engaged the services of a genealogist to search records on the East Coast regarding the sisters of the mother of the decedent, gave a history of the family, that there is no lineage from one of the sisters and that they are still investigating the other, that there was no father listed on the birth certificate and they are unable to find any information, that there are sensitive facts regarding the individuals that should not be discussed in open court, that it would explain why there are no heirs, that the decedent was in an orphanage, that the records are of poor quality, that there was indication of a brother but no information except that they had a falling out, that it is very hard to locate the records and that they have spent $1500.00 on the search. Mr. Bonanno further stated that they do not believe there will be success, that even if they found an heir there is a clause in the trust that decedent wants nothing to do with his family, that the bulk of the estate goes to charity, that this petition was filed to establish to banks and the brokerage company that the trust instrument was a trust relationship, that it is trust vs. third party, to establish what has been done regarding locating heirs, that it is possible that the decedent was in a foster home and that siblings referred to were not actual siblings, that they ask the Court to recognize that the funds should go to the trustee and that there have been no objections. The Court took the Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets and Authorizing and Directing Delivery of Said Assets to Trustee under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets And Authorizing And Directing Delivery Of Said Assets To Trustee
Off Calendar Sep-12-2016 Continued To Oct-03-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
